stemHtml: The "Expected Approach Time" is the time that…

options.a: the Pilot-in-Command estimates he/she will arrive overhead the aerodrome to commence the approach.
options.b: the Pilot-in-Command estimates he/she will arrive at the Initial Approach Fix, if the flight is without a delay.
options.c: ATC expects an aircraft to arrive over the Initial Approach Fix, if the flight is without a delay, to commence the instrument approach.
options.d: ATC expects that an aircraft, following a delay, will leave the holding fix to complete its approach for landing.
